models.transport: accepted for executed native rows; unattempted rows remain non-claims
models.raw_json_syntax: invalid for every retained executed structured response
models.normalized_json_syntax: accepted only for deterministic single-complete-json-fence unwrapping
models.schema_validity: cell-specific; normalization never overrides schema failure
models.latency: single-call descriptive evidence only; no statistical or cache attribution
models.admission: research-only, task-bounded; no broad family admission

normalization_contract.rescues_when: entire raw response is one complete JSON fence, unchanged inner payload parses and passes fixed schema
must_not_rescue_when: semantic repair, key rename, coercion, insertion, deletion, regeneration

non_claims: No broad conclusion from a missing/zero-call cell.
No context scaling, loaded-session cache benefit, physical KV reuse, memory attribution, or statistical latency ranking.
No reasoning off/on comparison for exact Unsloth model.
